artPrompt: A boxy brass-and-cyan thopter inspector drone hovers menacingly at eye level, twin whirring blades above and a single glowing lens fixed on the viewer, a tiny mechanical arm extending a blank illegible citation slip. Beige corridors and filing cabinets recede below it. It found a violation; it will always find a violation. The drone floats high in the wide frame, casting a long shadow. Wide 4:3 landscape, cold municipal glow, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Parking Enforcement Drone
text:
Flying
Whenever a creature an opponent controls attacks, its controller may pay {1}. If they don't, that creature gets a ticket and gets -1/-0 until end of turn.
flavorText: It found a violation. It will always find a violation.
